title: Review Launcher
concept: A compact local-development launcher for core contributors that separates PR, branch, GitHub, Blueprint, zip, and vanilla starts into distinct review routes while a contextual drawer exposes the exact inputs, save destinations, consequences, and results for the selected workflow.
flows: Launch a Gutenberg PR, save it in browser storage with file-copy progress, receive a saved Playground identity, rename or delete it, reload settings, export a zip, and confirm import-over-current-site consequences.
Choose among Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, and .zip import with route-specific inputs and constraints.
Save the same temporary Playground either in browser storage or to a selected local directory as distinct destinations.
Manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds, including filtering, current-site identity, rename, delete, and temporary-state warnings.
Use Site Manager settings, file browser, Blueprint editor, database tools, logs, WP Admin, Homepage, reset or reload, and export actions while the live WordPress preview remains visible.
Search and filter the Blueprint catalog, inspect a selected Blueprint detail, run it, or inspect its JSON before execution.
featureCoverage: create vanilla Playground
create from WordPress PR
create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub with account connection and token caveat
run Blueprint URL
import .zip with replacement warning
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
select featured Blueprint detail and run or inspect it
save temporary Playground in browser storage
save temporary Playground to a local directory
show save progress
browse saved and unsaved Playgrounds
rename a saved Playground
delete a saved Playground
navigate active WordPress paths and refresh the embedded page
open Homepage and WP Admin
edit WordPress, PHP, language, older-version, network, and multisite settings
show destructive reset and saved reload behavior
use file browser with new file, new folder, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
view, copy, download, and run the current Blueprint bundle
inspect database driver, path, and size
download database.sqlite
open Adminer and phpMyAdmin
inspect Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs
export to GitHub
download as .zip
